color_scheme: black background with white and vibrant orange accents
typography: clean geometric sans-serif; bold headers with selective orange highlighting and light-weight body text
background: solid matte black
accent_elements: thin horizontal dividers, rectangular content cards with subtle borders, small orange square bullet points, and monospaced-style metadata
mood: modern startup, athletic/performance, sleek and technical

color_scheme: cream background with charcoal text and ochre/gold accents
typography: clean neo-grotesque sans-serif (e.g. Inter or Helvetica); bold headers with generous tracking, regular weight body text, and occasional italicized ochre highlights
background: solid light cream / off-white
accent_elements: thin horizontal dividers, hairline borders, small geometric icons, Roman numeral numbering, and subtle progress bars
mood: modern startup meets editorial report; sophisticated, authoritative, and clean

color_scheme: cream background with black text and vibrant orange accents
typography: bold geometric sans-serif headers, medium-weight sans-serif body, and monospaced font for technical data/code
background: solid light cream/off-white with occasional full-bleed orange section breaks
accent_elements: thin horizontal dividers, geometric data visualizations, circular status badges, and monospaced labels for a technical aesthetic

color_scheme: dark navy and black background with neon cyan and magenta accents
typography: clean sans-serif; bold headers with wide tracking, medium-weight body text, and monospaced-style data labels
background: solid dark navy with a 'starfield' of scattered neon pixels and subtle concentric radar-line overlays
accent_elements: thin cyan borders, corner brackets, glowing neon text effects, data-grid heatmaps, and small geometric 'pixel' particles
mood: modern startup / cyberpunk tech / futuristic fintech

color_scheme: cream background with forest green and charcoal accents
typography: bold geometric sans-serif headers with italicized emphasis, clean sans-serif body text
background: solid light cream / off-white

color_scheme: dark charcoal and cream backgrounds with deep burgundy and muted orange accents

background: alternating solid dark charcoal and light cream/off-white
accent_elements: thin horizontal dividers, minimalist data visualizations (concentric circles, line graphs, bar charts), and small circular dot markers

color_scheme: bone white and charcoal with high-contrast accents of siren red, acid lime, cobalt blue, and field brown

accent_elements: thick horizontal dividers, circular badge callouts, color-blocked SKU cards, and thin-line rectangular borders
